---
title: "Hai-lights"
listing:
  contents: .
  sort:
    - "date desc"
    - "title desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
page-layout: full
body-classes: hailights-page
format:
  html:
    css: ../styles.css?v=20260421b
    title-block-banner: true
---

Hai-lights covers a range of industry topics and personal observations.

```{=html}
<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
  const categoryMap = {
    "news": "News",
    "introduction": "Introduction",
    "ai exploration": "AI Exploration",
    "verification": "Verification"
  };

  document.querySelectorAll(".quarto-listing-category .category, .listing-category").forEach(function (el) {
    const text = el.childNodes[0] && el.childNodes[0].nodeType === Node.TEXT_NODE
      ? el.childNodes[0].nodeValue.trim()
      : el.textContent.trim();
    const normalized = text.toLowerCase();
    if (categoryMap[normalized]) {
      if (el.childNodes[0] && el.childNodes[0].nodeType === Node.TEXT_NODE) {
        el.childNodes[0].nodeValue = categoryMap[normalized] + " ";
      } else {
        el.textContent = categoryMap[normalized];
      }
    }
  });
});
</script>
```
